chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP NO.D-1975/2024 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 13.01.2025 Mr. Zeeshan Abdullah advocate for petitioner. Pir Riaz Muhammad Shah, Deputy Attorney General. Mr. Jan Muhammad Khuro, Additional Advocate General Sindh. Mr. Ali Haider Saleem, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh. Mansoor Ali Bozdar, DSP/SDPO Qaidabad................ Comments submitted by police officer present and statement filed by counsel are taken on record. Counsel does not press instant petition as missing child has been recovered. Petition is accordingly disposed of as not-pressed. J U D G E J U D G E IK
